novelty: Session 12: Phase 3 deep research swarms complete — 4 novel merged-KG analyses

Disease-Drug-Sex Triangulation.finding: Diseases mapped via gene associations to sex-biased drug safety profiles
Disease-Drug-Sex Triangulation.novelty: First disease-gene-drug-sex chain analysis using merged KG

Clinical Trial Sex-Gap.finding: Drugs with strong sex-differential signals cross-referenced with trial coverage
Clinical Trial Sex-Gap.novelty: Identifies drugs most urgently needing sex-stratified trials

Herb-Target Sex-Bias Bridge.finding: Ayurvedic herbs linked to sex-biased drug safety via shared molecular targets

PPI Sex-Bias Propagation.finding: Sex-bias scores propagated through STRING PPI network to find bias hubs
PPI Sex-Bias Propagation.novelty: Network-level sex-bias analysis reveals hidden bias in untargeted proteins
